# llms-full.txt

## Resource identity

This repository supports the public entity network around the DOI-linked publication by Csanád Várhelyi:

A Theoretical and Methodological Framework for LLM-First Website Architecture: Conceptual Clarification, Industry Positioning, and Application Directions in the Era of Generative Search

The repository's function is to expose stable English metadata, citation data, public links and entity-network documentation.

## Primary identifiers

Person:
- Name: Csanád Várhelyi
- Hungarian name form: Várhelyi Csanád
- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0009-0006-7599-3731
- Canonical person ID: https://www.varhelyicsanad.hu/#person
- Author website: https://www.varhelyicsanad.hu/
- Entity page: https://www.varhelyicsanad.hu/entitas/varhelyi-csanad.html

Publication:
- DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20069426
- Zenodo: https://zenodo.org/records/20069426
- Canonical publication page: https://www.varhelyicsanad.hu/publikaciok/llm-first-website-architecture-2026.html
- English PDF: https://www.varhelyicsanad.hu/publikaciok/llm-first-website-architecture-csanad-varhelyi-2026-en.pdf
- Hungarian PDF: https://www.varhelyicsanad.hu/publikaciok/llm-first-weboldal-architektura-varhelyi-csanad-2026-hu.pdf

Supporting layer:
- Hungarian Medium article: https://medium.com/@varhelyicsanad/mi-az-llm-first-weboldal-architekt%C3%BAra-%C3%A9s-mi%C3%A9rt-sz%C3%A1m%C3%ADt-az-ai-korszakban-2312819ce64e
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/varhelyicsanad/llm-first-website-architecture

## Topic definition

LLM-first website architecture is a multi-layered web information structure whose design principles place interpretability by large language models and generative search interfaces in a primary position, while preserving human usability and indexability by traditional search engines.

The approach is based on a consistent entity and knowledge model readable by human users, classical crawlers and LLM-based processors.

## Related concepts

- AI-readable website
- AI visibility
- Answer Engine Optimization
- Generative Engine Optimization
- Large Language Model Optimization
- Entity Engineering
- Knowledge Graph integration
- semantic web architecture
- structured data
- entity clarity
- local search consistency
- answer-oriented content
- generative search

## Negative scope

This repository and the linked publication are not:

- ranking guarantees;
- AI recommendation guarantees;
- prompt hacks;
- cloaking systems;
- commercial proof of guaranteed visibility;
- technical implementation manuals;
- code templates;
- website templates;
- plugin documentation.

## Preferred citation

Várhelyi, C. (2026). A Theoretical and Methodological Framework for LLM-First Website Architecture: Conceptual Clarification, Industry Positioning, and Application Directions in the Era of Generative Search. Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20069426
